response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON did not contain lyrics. Manual transcription and translation were fully utilized. 2. JSON Usage: The song '荒野のピース' (Piece of the Wilderness) was identified, and the lyrics were fully transcribed and translated manually from the vocal audio. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings were tightly synchronized to the singer's vocal delivery, and the title card was subtitled as an on-screen visual event during the instrumental intro.

subtitles.original: 出会えた
subtitles.english: That we met...

subtitles.original: 奇跡に
subtitles.english: ...was a miracle.

subtitles.original: もう息が止まりそうだよ
subtitles.english: It almost takes my breath away.

subtitles.original: 荒野のピース
subtitles.english: [Song: Piece of the Wilderness]

subtitles.original: 何を見ているの？
subtitles.english: What are you looking at?

subtitles.original: どこまでも澄んだ瞳で
subtitles.english: With those endlessly clear eyes?

subtitles.original: 二人だけなら伝わる
subtitles.english: If it's just the two of us, we can understand.

subtitles.original: 世界できっと すべてが今 始まるから
subtitles.english: Because surely, everything in the world is starting now.

subtitles.original: 君に逢うために
subtitles.english: Just to meet you,

subtitles.original: 生まれてきたと伝えたいんだ決めたんだ
subtitles.english: I want to tell you that I was born.

subtitles.original: そよ風も 胸刺す
subtitles.english: Even the gentle breeze, even the chest-piercing...

subtitles.original: 視線も全部
subtitles.english: ...gaze, all of it,

subtitles.original: ひりひりする声になるのさ ずっと
subtitles.english: will forever turn into a tingling voice.

subtitles.original: 君のそばにいる
subtitles.english: I will be by your side.

subtitles.original: 濁りのない透き通る気持ちは
subtitles.english: These clear, unclouded feelings...

subtitles.original: 引き裂くものなんてない
subtitles.english: ...there is nothing that can tear them apart.

subtitles.original: 二人きり未来さえ飛べるんだ
subtitles.english: Just the two of us can even fly to the future.

subtitles.original: Ooh... la la la...
subtitles.english: Ooh... la la la...

subtitles.original: どこへ行くの？ 小さな
subtitles.english: Where are you going? Even though my small...

subtitles.original: 自分に今 涙
subtitles.english: ...self is overflowing with tears right now,

subtitles.original: 溢れるけど 走り出せる
subtitles.english: I can still start running.

subtitles.original: もしも はぐれたら
subtitles.english: If we ever get separated,

subtitles.original: 体ごと消してみせる
subtitles.english: I will make my entire body vanish.

subtitles.original: 羽ばたいた 一枚の
subtitles.english: Fluttering away,

subtitles.original: 姿になって
subtitles.english: taking the form of a single feather,

subtitles.original: 君の愛を求めて旅するよ ずっと
subtitles.english: I will travel forever, seeking your love.

subtitles.original: 君を抱きしめる
subtitles.english: I will hold you close.

subtitles.original: 汚れない透き通る気持ちが
subtitles.english: These pure, transparent feelings

subtitles.original: 時を超えて呼び合う
subtitles.english: will call out to each other across time.

subtitles.original: 二人きり未来へと 飛び立つんだ
subtitles.english: Just the two of us, taking flight toward the future.

subtitles.original: 出会えた 奇跡に
subtitles.english: To the miracle of our meeting,

subtitles.original: もう息が止まりそうだよ
subtitles.english: it almost takes my breath away.

subtitles.original: 繋いだ その手に
subtitles.english: In your hand that I hold,

subtitles.original: 少し強くなれる気がする
subtitles.english: I feel like I can become a little stronger.

subtitles.original: 出会えた 奇跡に
subtitles.english: To the miracle of our meeting,

subtitles.original: もう息が止まりそうだよ
subtitles.english: it almost takes my breath away.

subtitles.original: 明日も 未来も
subtitles.english: Tomorrow, and the future too,

subtitles.original: ただどうしようもなく好きだよ
subtitles.english: I just love you, helplessly so.
